body.title: CLOSED: post-sprint grader in sprint-ticket skill
body.result: grader step 8.5 added to sprint-ticket skill; Haiku subagent grades diff vs Test plan, advisory only
body.description:
Add a grader step to /sprint-ticket (after step 8 tests, before step 10 commit). Spawn a fresh CC subagent context with: the staged diff (`git diff --staged`) and the ticket's Test plan section. Grader checks: are the tests described in Test plan present in the diff? Surface any gaps inline. Grader is advisory only — does not block the close. Catches 'tests written but not actually covering the described scenario' before it compounds.

**Affected files:** `~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket` (add grader step between step 8 and step 10)
**Design rules:** grader is advisory (never blocks close); fresh subagent context only sees diff + test plan (no full session state); grader prompt minimal; if Test plan says 'no tests because: <reason>' grader skips silently
**Scope boundary:** IN — grader step in sprint-ticket, surface gaps inline. OUT — no auto-fix of test gaps, no grader for design-rule quality (test plan only), no change to commit/push flow.
**Test plan:** manual verification — run sprint on a ticket whose Test plan names a specific test; confirm grader fires and correctly identifies whether that test appears in the diff
